title.zh: Nan Yu 的今日 X 动态

quote: When is Venmo gonna finally turn off that feature that lets me see when two of my mutual friends are hooking up?

sentences.zh: Nan Yu 这条偏日常吐槽，先保留原文作为 feed 噪声样本。

en.text: When is Venmo gonna finally turn off that feature that lets me see when two of my mutual friends are hooking up?
